Document:
# Core Rule 6 - No Idling
Do not idle or go AFK during an active round for a prolonged period of time. If you need to step away, please use the game's cryosleep system to remove yourself from the round so your role can be filled by another player.
Idling in a critical role (such as Captain, Chief Medical Officer, or Head of Security) is held to a stricter standard and may result in admin action even for short periods of inactivity.
Idling can and will likely lead to a permanent ban at an admins discretion.
